_meta.notes: Legacy hand-constructed TaskCreate fixture preserved for regression backstop. This is the FLAT tool_response.id shape that test fixtures used between PR #603 and #620; it does NOT match production. Kept here so a test can assert the function still extracts a task_id from this shape (the fix is additive — flat fallback remains, nested probe is added ahead of it). DO NOT use this shape for new tests; new tests MUST use task_create_production_shape.json.
